message:
fix(inference): correct 3 mathematical bugs in inference modules

1. evt.rs MLE gradient (line 481): Signs were swapped in the GPD
   log-likelihood gradient computation. Fixed ∂ℓ/∂ξ to correctly
   compute: ln(1+ξz)/ξ² - (1+1/ξ) * z/(1+ξz)

2. robust.rs log-loss (line 563): Only computed one term of the
   cross-entropy loss based on k_rate condition. Fixed to compute
   full cross-entropy: -k_rate * ln(p) - (1-k_rate) * ln(1-p)

3. conformal.rs adaptive alpha (line 593): Sign was inverted -
   code increased α when undercovering but should decrease it.
   Fixed adjustment direction to match the documented behavior.

All 225 inference tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
